summary: Iteration 17: Tested new features - Party/Ledger Master (search, date filters, Excel/PDF export) and Chit Fund (Opening installments, profit calculation, Edit Opening). Found and fixed PDF export bug (doc.autoTable is not a function). All features now working correctly.

party_ledger_search.search_input: WORKING - data-testid='search-input' present, filters ledgers by name
party_ledger_search.date_filters: WORKING - From and To date inputs present with Clear button
party_ledger_search.pdf_export: FIXED - data-testid='export-pdf', downloads Ledger_Master_YYYY-MM-DD.pdf (was broken due to jspdf-autotable import issue)

chit_fund_opening.opening_stat_box: WORKING - Shows 'Opening (पहले से)' with installments and amount (16 Inst. ₹7,00,000)
chit_fund_opening.profit_so_far: WORKING - Shows 'Profit So Far (अभी तक का लाभ)' = ₹1,00,000 (8L - 7L)
chit_fund_opening.edit_opening_button: WORKING - Opens modal with Installments Already Paid and Total Amount Paid inputs
chit_fund_opening.edit_opening_modal: WORKING - Shows preview calculation with Expected, Actual Paid, and Profit So Far

profit_calculation_verification.formula: Profit = Expected Pay (Installments × EMI) - Actual Paid + Dividends

bug_fixed.issue: PDF export failing with 'TypeError: doc.autoTable is not a function'
bug_fixed.root_cause: jspdf-autotable side-effect import 'import jspdf-autotable' doesn't work reliably in React due to tree-shaking
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed import to use applyPlugin method: import { applyPlugin } from 'jspdf-autotable'; applyPlugin(jsPDF);

seed_data_creation: Test Chit Fund with opening_installments_paid=16, opening_amount_paid=700000 already exists
context_for_next_testing_agent: Party Ledger page has search input, date filters (From/To with Clear), Excel and PDF export buttons. Chit Fund page shows Opening balance, Total Installments Done, Expected Pay, Profit So Far, and Edit Opening button. Profit calculation formula: Expected (Installments × EMI) - Actual Paid + Dividends.
